questions.question: Who has scored the most runs in IPL history?
questions.ground_truth: V Kohli with 8746 runs.

text_to_sql.answer: V Kohli has scored the most runs in IPL history with 9,346 runs.
text_to_sql.sql:
SELECT p.player_name, SUM(d.runs_batter) AS total_runs
FROM deliveries d
JOIN players p ON p.player_id = d.batter_id
GROUP BY d.batter_id
ORDER BY total_runs DESC
LIMIT 1

hybrid_rag.answer: The context does not contain enough information to determine the all-time leading run-scorer in IPL history, as it only provides individual season data for a few players.

light_rag.answer: The provided graph context does not contain any player statistics, such as individual run totals, so it cannot answer who has scored the most runs in IPL history.

questions.question: Which team has won the most matches in IPL history?
questions.ground_truth: Mumbai Indians with 155 wins.

text_to_sql.answer: Mumbai Indians have won the most matches in IPL history with 155 wins.
text_to_sql.sql:
SELECT t.team_name, COUNT(*) AS total_wins
FROM matches m
JOIN teams t ON t.team_id = m.winner_id
WHERE m.winner_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY t.team_id, t.team_name
ORDER BY total_wins DESC
LIMIT 1;

hybrid_rag.answer: The context does not contain enough information to determine which team has won the most matches in IPL history. It only provides a few match results from specific seasons.

text_to_sql.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT t.team_name
FROM deliveries d
JOIN innings i ON d.innings_id = i.innings_id
JOIN players p ON p.player_id = d.batter_id
JOIN teams t ON t.team_id = i.batting_team_id
WHERE p.player_name LIKE '%Dhoni%';

ORDER BY matches_played DESC

questions.question: Who won the most Player of the Match awards in Hyderabad?
questions.ground_truth: Top POM winners in Hyderabad: DA Warner (9), Abhishek Sharma (5), Rashid Khan (4), DW Steyn (3), B Kumar (3).

text_to_sql.answer: David Warner won the most Player of the Match awards in Hyderabad with 9.
text_to_sql.sql:
SELECT p.player_name, COUNT(*) AS awards
FROM matches m
JOIN venues v ON m.venue_id = v.venue_id
JOIN players p ON m.player_of_match_id = p.player_id
WHERE v.city = 'Hyderabad'
GROUP BY p.player_id, p.player_name
ORDER BY awards DESC
LIMIT 1

questions.question: Which venues has Chennai Super Kings played at most frequently in IPL?
questions.ground_truth: CSK's most frequent venues: MA Chidambaram Stadium, Chepauk, Chennai (47 matches); MA Chidambaram Stadium, Chepauk, Chennai, Chennai (28 matches); Wankhede Stadium, Mumbai (14 matches); Wankhede Stadium, Mumbai, Mumbai (13 matches); Eden Gardens, Kolkata (11 matches).

text_to_sql.answer: Chennai Super Kings have played most frequently at MA Chidambaram Stadium, Chepauk with 47 matches.
text_to_sql.sql:
SELECT v.venue_name, COUNT(*) AS matches_played
FROM matches m
JOIN venues v ON m.venue_id = v.venue_id
WHERE m.team1_id = (SELECT team_id FROM teams WHERE team_name = 'Chennai Super Kings')
   OR m.team2_id = (SELECT team_id FROM teams WHERE team_name = 'Chennai Super Kings')
GROUP BY v.venue_id, v.venue_name
ORDER BY matches_played DESC
LIMIT 10
